x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Employee Center Pro is the delivery surface for Now Assist employee self-service AI capabilities. Without it, AI-powered knowledge search, HR case deflection, and virtual agent integrations cannot reach employees through the expected portal experience.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Employee Center Pro via the ServiceNow Store. Employee Center Pro is required for Now Assist AI-powered knowledge search, HR case deflection, and employee self-service experiences. If Employee Center is active but not Pro, upgrade to Employee Center Pro.
